song.title: Who Am I
song.author: Mark Hall
song.presentation: V1 P C V2 P C B B P C
song.lyrics:
[V1] . G C Em D (2x) . G D/F# Em7 Who am I, that the Lord of all the earth . D/F# C D C Would care to know my name, would care to feel my hurt? . G D/F# Em7 Who am I, that the bright and morning star . D/F# C D C Would choose to light the way, for my ever wandering heart?
[P] . C D Em7 D/F# Not because of who I am, but because of what You’ve done . Em7 D/F# C D Not because of what I’ve done, but because of who You are
[C] .G D/F# Em7 D C I am a flower quickly fading, here today and gone tomorrow . D C D/F# G A wave tossed in the ocean, a vapor in the wind . D/F# Em7 Still You hear me when I’m calling . D C Lord, You catch me when I’m falling . D C G (C Em D G C Em D) And You’ve told me who I am, I am yours…
[V2] Who am I, that the eyes that see my shame Would look on me with love, and watch me rise again?|| Who am I, that the voice that calmed the sea Would call out through the rain, and calm the storm in me?
[B] .G C Em D Whom shall I fear, whom shall I fear . G C Em D 'Cause I am Yours, I am Yours
